title: Border Limit Xaero's

body:
**Border Limit Xaero's**

Border Limit Xaero's is a client add-on for conveniently marking areas on the Xaero map.  
It is suitable if you want to mark bases, farms, projects, and any other areas without unnecessary commands and server plugins.

## What it can do

- Draw zones directly on the map (Draw mode)
- Edit existing zones
- Rename zones
- Change border and fill colors
- Delete zones
- Local storage (data remains on your client)

## How to use

1. Open the Xaero map
2. Turn on Draw (top right)
3. LMB - draw a zone. Shift + LMB - delete part of a zone.
4. LMB on a zone (outside Draw) to select it
5. Use the Rename / Border / Fill / Delete buttons to edit.

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric
- Xaero's Minimap

Recommended:
- Xaero's World Map (for full functionality in full-screen map).

Mod developed based on an idea by: conquistador1444
Author: nertin0

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)
